final:
module top_module(
    input clk,
    input ss,
    input sr,
    input d,
    output reg q
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (ss) // Synchronous set
            q <= 1;
        else if (sr) // Synchronous reset
            q <= 0;
        else // No set or reset
            q <= d;
    end

endmodule
